title: Spec placeholder substitution edge cases
description: render_template in crud.rs matches \w+ within {{...}} and stringifies non-string JSON values via Value::to_string (which emits quoted strings). Behaviors for empty strings, nested objects, arrays, nulls, and duplicate keys are undocumented. Write a RECIPE-TEMPLATES.md spec plus unit tests that pin down: (a) how each JSON type renders, (b) whether nulls are allowed, (c) case-sensitivity, (d) escape syntax for literal double-brace.
reasoning: Template rendering is the contract between recipe authors and the execution engine. Without a written spec, authors guess and produce brittle prompts; LLM output silently regresses when edge-case values arrive. Spec + tests makes the behavior trustworthy.
